title: Inventory SCD data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory separating prevalence maps, screening data, facility data, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.

title: Map sub-national SCD birth prevalence
outcome: Sub-national SCD birth-prevalence map combining DHS data and global allele-frequency maps.
validation_method: Replicator confirms prevalence estimation methodology and cross-validation.
done_condition: Prevalence map with validation metrics and replication.

title: Map SCD screening and treatment coverage gaps
outcome: Gap map comparing birth prevalence to screening and treatment coverage.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and coverage-data validation.
done_condition: Gap map with methodology and replication.

title: Check whether outputs match SCD program planning needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
